summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Celebrity Buzz Index iteration 3. ALL FEATURES WORKING PERFECTLY! All 7 categories display correctly, UK celebrities in correct categories, How It Works section present, celebrity photos in trending ticker, Wikipedia links functional, search works, Add to Team works, share modal functional, leaderboard displays teams. Major fixes from previous iterations verified - TV Actors and Musicians categories now loading properly.

✅ UK celebrities in correct categories: Prince Andrew=Royals, Katie Price=Reality TV, Gemma Collins=Reality TV
✅ How It Works section displays with 3-step process
✅ Celebrity photos visible in trending ticker (18 photos found)
✅ Wikipedia links visible and functional on celebrity cards
✅ Search functionality works (Katie Price, Gemma Collins tested)
✅ Add to Team works - budget deduction correct (£50M → £43M)
✅ Share modal opens with Twitter and copy link options
✅ Leaderboard displays teams with points
✅ TV Actors category loads 4 celebrities (FIXED from iteration 2)
✅ Musicians category loads 3 celebrities (FIXED from iteration 2)
✅ Other category loads 1 celebrity (Gordon Ramsay)
✅ Royals category loads 3 celebrities including Prince Andrew
✅ Reality TV category loads 2 celebrities including Katie Price
✅ Backend API 100% success rate (10/10 tests passed)
✅ AI news generation working with GPT-4o integration
✅ Team management (create, add, remove) fully functional
✅ Budget calculations accurate
✅ Category detection improved (Athletes before Musicians)
✅ Trending ticker with celebrity buzz scores
✅ All Add to Team buttons clickable (no overlay blocking)
✅ Share functionality with Twitter and copy options
